title: Shuttle Art 144 Pack Colouring Pencils Bulk, 12 Colours Pack of 12 Sharpened Coloured Pencil Set for School, School Pack Wooden Drawing Pencils for Kids, Class pack Back to School Supplies
features: 144 PACK VALUE SET: Shuttle Art 144 pack bulk colouring pencils come in 12 packs of 12 assorted colours: Black, Gray, Blue, Cerulean Blue, Spring Green, Forest Green, Brown, Canary Yellow, Orange, Purple, Pink and Red. They are classic colors and are widely used in classrooms, daycare centers, art classes and homes.

BREAK-RESISTANT & DURABLE: The class set coloured pencils are made from high quality basswood, which sharpen easily and consistently without breakage. High quality and thick lead core guard against frustrating breakages during general use and sharpening, durable enough for long time use.
RICH & VIBRANT COLORS: Richly pigmented bulk pencils bring vivid colours and creamy textures for kids and adults, making the art journey easy and fun. Quality products ensure a good experience.
PRE-SHARPENED: Pre-sharpened colored pencils save your time of preparations and let kids to start drawing and coloring right away.

PRODUCT & SERVICE GUARANTEE: Conform to ASTM-D4236 and EN71 standards, safe and non-toxic, great for kids ages 3 and up. Your satisfaction is our top priority, please rest assured to purchase our products. If you are not satisfied with our products or have any questions, please feel free to contact us at any time.
